primary_evidence: P and V850 are compared through pre-registered offset/edge/gradient structures, not only same-region same-sign values.
counter_evidence: None; this is a design constraint.
allowed_statement: Same-region P and V850 deltas are insufficient as a standalone correspondence claim.
forbidden_statement: Do not infer no correspondence solely from opposite-signed same-region P and V850 changes.

primary_evidence: V_positive_north_edge_shift=3; high-lat P deltas mostly positive.
counter_evidence: Does not prove causality or lagged influence.
allowed_statement: V850 positive north-edge extension is object-layer consistent with high-latitude P increase for this sector/comparison.
forbidden_statement: Do not state that V850 caused high-latitude P increase.

counter_evidence: Distance-only cases are not mechanism proof.
allowed_statement: P change peaks can be inspected against V850 change/gradient structures using the dedicated table.
forbidden_statement: Do not treat the nearest V structure as a post-hoc causal match.

counter_evidence: Climatological alignment does not imply change correspondence.
allowed_statement: P climatological bands can be compared with V850 climatological peak/centroid/edge positions.
forbidden_statement: Do not use climatological P bands as P change peaks.
